description: Auto-synthesized isValid rollup gating a button (§55.7). The submit button's disabled=!@signup.isValid. Initially invalid (disabled); typing a valid "Ada" flips signup.isValid true and the disabled attribute is removed (button enabled).
rationale: §55.7 @signup.isValid is a read-only synthesized rollup; binding disabled=!isValid gates the submit. A valid field write removes disabled. The whole-tree dom shows the button with no disabled attr (the enable transition); no impl message text is involved so it is lockable.
